2605.10155.title: NyayaAI: An AI-Powered Legal Assistant Using Multi-Agent Architecture and Retrieval-Augmented Generation
2605.10155.paper_summary: Legal information in India remains largely inaccessible due to the complexity of legal language and the sheer volume of legal documentation involved in research and case analysis. This paper presents NyayaAI, an AI-powered legal assistant that automates and simplifies legal workflows for lawyers, law students, and general users. The system combines Large Language Models with a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline grounded in a curated Indian legal knowledge base comprising constitutional provisions, statutes, case laws, and judicial precedents. A multi-agent architecture orchestrated through the Mastra TypeScript framework coordinates a main agent with specialized sub-agents handling legal research, document summarization, case law retrieval, and drafting assistance. A compliance module validates all responses before delivery. Domain classification achieved 70\% precision across test samples, with RAG retrieval precision at 74\% and overall response accuracy at 72\%, demonstrating that structured multi-agent LLM systems can meaningfully improve legal accessibility and workflow efficiency. The code\footnote{https://github.com/B97784/NyayaAI} is made publicly available for the benefit of the research community.
2605.10155.paper_summary_zh: 法律資訊在印度由於法律語言的複雜性以及涉及研究和案件分析的大量法律文件，仍然難以獲得。<lb/>本文介紹了NyayaAI，一個AI驅動的法律助理，旨在自動化和簡化律師、法學學生和一般用戶的法律工作流程。<lb/>該系統結合了大型語言模型和基於精心策劃的印度法律知識庫的檢索增強生成管道，該知識庫包括憲法條款、法規、案例法和司法先例。<lb/>通過Mastra TypeScript框架協調的多代理架構，將一個主要代理與專門的子代理相結合，處理法律研究、文件摘要、案例法檢索和起草協助。<lb/>合規模塊在交付之前驗證所有回應。<lb/>領域分類在測試樣本中達到70%的精確度，RAG檢索精確度為74%，整體回應準確度為72%，顯示結構化的多代理LLM系統可以有意義地改善法律可及性和工作流程效率。<lb/>該代碼\footnote{https://github.com/B97784/NyayaAI}已公開提供，以造福研究社群。
2605.10155.author: Deepanshu et.al.
2605.10155.authors: Deepanshu, Divi Saxena, Deepali Rana, Ayesha Varshney, Sahinur Rahman Laskar
